product_overview: APP Finanças 2026 is a mobile-first personal finance web app that centralizes budgets, transactions, goals, protections (rules) and an AI Coach to help users plan and optimize spending. It provides a modern dashboard, goal wizard, and Supabase-backed auth/data integration.
core_goals: Provide a unified dashboard that summarizes balances, goals and alerts for quick financial overview.
Allow users to create, track and manage financial goals with a guided Goal Wizard.
Enable recording and categorization of transactions and enforcing budgets and protection rules.
Offer an AI Coach to deliver contextual suggestions and guidance based on the user's financial data.
Ensure secure authentication and Row Level Security via Supabase, and a responsive mobile-first UI.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email and password via Supabase and redirect them to the Dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> See redirect to / -> Dashboard loads
Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field with invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> See inline validation error for email

Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with wrong credentials -> Click Sign In button -> See authentication error returned by Supabase (invalid credentials) displayed

features.name: Dashboard (Resumo Geral)
features.description: Show unified summary: account balances, active goals, budget status and urgent alerts on one main screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> See redirect to / -> Dashboard loads with balances, active goals and alerts
Navigate to / -> If not authenticated, see redirect to /auth (access denied) -> Remain on /auth until signed in
Navigate to / -> See budget overrun alert -> Click alert -> See details about which budget/category is over limit

features.name: Manage Transactions (Gastos)
features.description: List and record expenses/entries so users can track money flows and see recent transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /gastos -> Click Add Transaction button -> Fill date field -> Fill amount field -> Select category -> Click Save -> See new transaction in the list and updated balance
Navigate to /gastos -> Click Add Transaction button -> Fill amount field with non-numeric value -> Click Save -> See validation error preventing save
Navigate to /gastos -> Scroll transaction list -> Click a transaction -> See transaction details modal or edit view

features.name: Budget Planning (Orçamento)
features.description: Define and manage monthly or category budgets and surface alerts when users approach or exceed limits.
user_flows: Navigate to /orcamento -> Click Set Budget button -> Fill budget amount -> Assign categories and period -> Click Save -> See budget listed and active alerts enabled
Navigate to /orcamento -> Click Set Budget button -> Fill budget amount with negative number -> Click Save -> See validation error and budget is not saved
Navigate to /orcamento -> View list of budgets -> Click a budget -> See budget breakdown and spent vs remaining

features.name: Manage Goals (Metas) / Goal Wizard
features.description: Create, edit and track short/long-term financial goals using a guided Goal Wizard UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> Navigate to /metas -> View goals -> Click New Goal button -> Fill out goal wizard inputs -> Click Save -> See new goal listed on /metas
Navigate to /metas -> If not authenticated, see redirect to /auth -> Sign in to continue
Navigate to /metas -> Click New Goal button -> Fill out goal wizard inputs with missing required field -> Click Save -> See validation error and guidance to complete required fields

features.name: Protections / Rules (Regras)
features.description: Let users create programmatic protections and alerts (limits by category, pre-charge alerts) to prevent budget breaches.
user_flows: Navigate to /regras -> Click New Rule -> Fill rule name -> Select category and threshold -> Click Save -> See new rule active and notifications enabled
Navigate to /regras -> Click New Rule -> Enter conflicting or invalid threshold (e.g., negative value) -> Click Save -> See validation error describing conflict
Navigate to /regras -> See list of rules -> Click a rule -> Click Disable -> See rule state changed to inactive

features.name: AI Coach
features.description: Interactive AI assistant that analyzes the dashboard and provides savings tips, goal suggestions and explanations.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button -> Navigate to / -> Click Open AI Coach -> Type question or request -> Click Send -> See AI suggestions and contextual actions displayed
Navigate to / -> Click Open AI Coach -> Type question -> Click Send -> If AI service is unavailable, see error message 'Service unavailable' and fallback guidance
Navigate to / -> Click Open AI Coach -> Request a goal recommendation -> Click Apply Recommendation -> See suggested Goal Wizard fields pre-filled (user can edit and Save)

features.name: Manage Goals
features.description: Create and view short and long term goals
